executives.name: Bryan Wright
executives.background: Bryan Wright is senior vice president and chief accounting officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president and corporate controller for Exelon.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Generation

executives.name: Colette Honorable
executives.background: Partner at Reed Smith LLP. Former Commissioner of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC).

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: David Rhoades
executives.background: David Rhoades is executive vice president and chief nuclear officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president of operations for Exelon Generation and has over 30 years of experience in the nuclear industry.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Exelon Generation Company, LLC; President and Chief Nuclear Officer, Exelon Nuclear

executives.name: James McHugh
executives.background: James McHugh is executive vice president and chief commercial officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of Constellation (Exelon's retail and wholesale business) and has held various leadership roles in trading and portfolio management.

executives.name: John Richardson
executives.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

executives.name: John Rogers, Jr.
executives.background: Chairman, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Ariel Investments, LLC. He founded Ariel in 1983.

executives.name: Joseph Dominguez
executives.background: Joseph Dominguez is president and chief executive officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of ComEd from 2018 to 2022 and as executive vice president of governmental and regulatory affairs and public policy for Exelon from 2012 to 2018.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Governmental and Regulatory Affairs and Public Policy

executives.name: Kenneth Cornew
executives.background: Former Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer of Exelon Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Executive Vice President and CEO, Exelon Generation

executives.name: Nancy Gioia
executives.background: Ms. Gioia has served as a director since 2021. She retired from Ford Motor Company in 2014 after 33 years, where she served as Director of Global Electrification. She also serves on the board of Brady Corporation.

executives.name: Robert Lawless
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of McCormick & Company, Inc. He served as Chairman of the Board of McCormick from 1997 to 2009.

executives.name: Robert Shapard
executives.background: Robert S. Shapard has served as the independent Chairman of the Board since 2022. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.name: John Richardson
board_of_directors.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

board_of_directors.name: John Rogers, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Ariel Investments, LLC. He founded Ariel in 1983.

board_of_directors.name: Nancy Gioia
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Gioia has served as a director since 2021. She retired from Ford Motor Company in 2014 after 33 years, where she served as Director of Global Electrification. She also serves on the board of Brady Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Lawless
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of McCormick & Company, Inc. He served as Chairman of the Board of McCormick from 1997 to 2009.
